title: Charisma Vaccine
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In a near-future where social credit scores determine access to housing and healthcare, a failed influencer discovers an underground clinic that sells a vaccine to permanently reduce your charisma, granting a strange new freedom: the ability to be convincingly unlikable and thus left alone by the system.
long_description: In a near-future where social credit scores determine access to housing and healthcare, a failed influencer discovers an underground clinic that sells a vaccine to permanently reduce your charisma, granting a strange new freedom: the ability to be convincingly unlikable and thus left alone by the system.
